response:
We need to summarize email in exactly 2 sentences, capturing main point and any action items. Provide concise summary.

Email: March cohort satisfaction 7.2/10 down from 8.1. Positives: buddy system 9.1, IT on time. Issues: 5/8 confused about benefits deadline, tools access took 3-5 days (target 1 day), no culture handbook received. Priority: fix tools access. - Lisa

Thus main point: satisfaction dropped, positives and issues, priority fix tools access. Action items: fix tools access, maybe clarify benefits deadline, provide culture handbook. But priority is fix tools access. So two sentences: Sentence 1: March cohort satisfaction fell to 7.2/10, with strong ratings for the buddy system and timely IT setup but concerns about benefits deadline confusion, delayed tools access (3‑5 days vs 1‑day target), and missing culture handbook. Sentence
